title: Ubiquiti UniFi Access Point In Wall Hi-Density
description: UAP-IW-HD is a UniFi MU-MIMO ac Wave2 built-in wall-mounted Access Point. In the 5GHz band, it supports 4x4 MU-MIMO technology with a maximum modulation rate of 1733Mbps . In the 2.4GHz band, a radio with 2x2 MIMO supports modulation rate up to 300Mbps . The device itself can be powered by POE 802.3af . If you use the PoE passthrough function, you must use 802.3at powering The device is also equipped with an Ethernet switch, on the bottom you will find 4 Gigabit Ethernet , where the first port supports PoE passthough function. Also on back side you will find one Gigabit port supports PoE IN for powering device UniFi APs doesn't have own web GUI and you manage them via UniFi Controller , which you can download on UBNT websites here: http://www.ubnt.com . Or you can manage UAP devices using UniFi Cloud Key which has UniFi Controller preinstalled. Additional benefit is fact that UniFi Controller software is free of costs and includes advanced functions without limitations Zero Handoff Roaming Wireless uplink Up to 8 SSID Detailed traffic stats Guest network Load balance Speed limitaions for each SSID Devices Back plate, cover plate Screws
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 1733 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Security WEP, WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2, TKIP/AES) 802.1w/PMF 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] < 2, 3,4, 6 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (5) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 48V DC PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In Max. power consumption [W] 11 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 60 Weight [g] 210 Width [mm] 87 Height [mm] 140 Depth [mm] 26
